name: Easy Turkey Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together the spaghetti sauce, turkey, and zucchini.
3. Spread about 1 1/2 cups of this mixture into an ungreased rectangular baking dish, measuring 11x7x1/2 inches.
4. Top with 3 lasagna noodles.
5. Mix together the ricotta cheese, Parmesan cheese, and oregano.
6. Spread over the noodles in the dish.
7. Spread with another 1 1/2 cups of the turkey mixture.
8. Top with the remaining noodles and turkey mixture.
9. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese.
10. Bake uncovered for about 45 minutes, or until hot and bubbly. Let stand 15 minutes before cutting.
Makes 8 servings.
